title: Analysts tip pressure for Bitcoin, gold as US inflation tops 4%

title: Delaware, New Jersey advance bills banning crypto ATMs
summary: Lawmakers in Delaware and New Jersey have advanced laws that would completely ban crypto ATMs, a measure that has only been enacted in three US states.

title: Albania’s Flamingo Revolution Spreads From Kushner Resort to Political Elite
summary: As protests in Tirana extend into a second week, they have escalated from opposition to two €5 billion ($5.7 billion) planned resorts in ecologically sensitive areas linked to Jared Kushner into demands for the entire Albanian political establishment to step aside.

title: Asia’s Currency Fight Moves Offshore as Central Banks Push Back
summary: Asian central banks are increasingly facing currency pressures originating outside their borders.
